channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Posting on Pottery street lamppost, 17th March
item.description:
The lamppost is on Southwark council owned public land, the east corner of Pottery Street and Cherry Garden Street. The council took down previous fly posting signs from this exact same spot before.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pottery Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in bin bag on pavement, 17th March
item.description:
Someone has left a dead fox poking out of a bin bag by the tree on the corner of lyndhurst way and chadwick road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Chadwick Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste along Bellwood Rd, 17th March
item.description:
Lots of dog mess all along Bellwood Rd - this is a regular ongoing issue at the moment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellwood Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting bananas attracting flies between David Divine House and 133 Amhurst Road., 17th March
item.description:
Rotting bananas attracting flies between David Divine House and 133 Amhurst Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The sensor does not pick up vehicles, 17th March
item.description:
The traffic lights at the end of Beeston Place, turning on to Grovesnor Place are sensor activated. The sensor does not pick up vehicles unless they are in a very exact position. most of the time somebody has to wave the vehicles through as the lights just do not change, as they are only sensor activated.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Gardens, Victoria, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsing pavement (void underneath) between 12 & 14 Westbourne Road SE26 5NJ, 17th March
item.description:
The pavement has been collapsing for over a year, it has been reported and patched, but the void underneath has not been repaired. Thames Water was involved, but has passed on the responsibility. My neighbour at no.14 has been chasing the council to sort it for a long time with no results. The void under the pavement needs to be addressed and repaired before we can repair the ground and drainage on our properties. My neighbour at no.14 has already provided photos and much information. Please fix the void underneath the pavement as a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbourne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bags of unknown rubbish dumped on the kerb this morning, 17th March
item.description:
Some time between my return from a morning walk (around 7.45am) and the green bin collection at 09.30 this morning, two bags of rubbish were dumped on the kerb beside my bins. I did not see anyone dumping these items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ryelands Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in car park and down the pathway behind Orangery Studios leading to well hall road, 17th March
item.description:
Suitcases and domestic rubbish dumped again in the car park at the far end from the entrance. This is a recurring hotspot as no cameras. Rubbish has then been strewn along the length of the alleyway behind Orangery Studio's. There is a name and address on the rubbish which can’t be read in these pics but I do have the details if needed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dobell Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young Tree at the entrance of the Play area, 17th March
item.description:
This has been an issue before Young tree needs to be re staked as its come out of the ground and is leaning. Just to advise this has happened before and this is the second time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Munster Square, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long narrow pothole by bus stop, 17th March
item.description:
Easy to miss long, narrow pothole by bus stop, along the edge of a previous patch in the tarmac. This has already caused a blow-out puncture for one cyclist.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Way, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crescent Road Ertih, 17th March
item.description:
The street has not been swept for at least 6 weeks. The that people throw from shopping at Morrisons and from the corner shop is accumulating. It is an eyesore as the street is so dirty. Please can this be swept and cleaned regularly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Fouling, 17th March
item.description:
Dog fouling again everywhere right in middle of pavement - why can't dog owners clean up their dog's mess.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floyd Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain entry, 17th March
item.description:
Drain is blocked at surface level, covered over by mud etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 17th March
item.description:
Ther is a lot of rubbish around Plumstead Bus Garage area...there are no bins around.Is annyone responsible to cleaning this area...it's such a sad view for our community...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 17th March
item.description:
4 large bags of dumped rubbish, some railings and litter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 17th March
item.description:
Cardboard boxes and other rubbish along the school wall in Ceres Road have been here for several days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ceres Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins and bike, 17th March
item.description:
Someone has abandoned 2 bins and a bike outside my house for more then a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Coton Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing Bench, 17th March
item.description:
My Bench is missing for the second time I went on mothers day and it has disappeared !!! It is positioned near the small bridge in the Kelsey Park Very upsetting have called 01689862815 since Wednesday 11 march left messages spoke to a lady Monday 16 march 26, she gave me a mobile number of another person who has not replied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Block chute, 17th March
item.description:
The rubbish chute of flat 64-78 Sunbury street se18 5lz is blocked. It’s been 2 days.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sunbury Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole now 30cms deep near kerb on a major bus route., 17th March
item.description:
This is on a major bus route and the buses constantly go down the pothole and the pathway is now covered in broken bits of tarmac. Danger to people walking on the pavement as well as vehicles on the road. This has now been there a long time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Road, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet
